Off Calendar Feb-10-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: William Charles Dresser, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice at the request of Plaintiff. JUDGE CYNTHIA MING-MEI LEE; Clerk RWoods/MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)
